news.t: Polen Capital Expands Active ETF Lineup with Two Credit ETFs

overview.description: The Polen Floating Rate Income ETF (PCFI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund comprising high yield, floating rate bank loans and corporate debts predominantly of middle market issuers in North America. It targets a concentrated portfolio of 60 to 110 undervalued instruments. PCFI was launched on Mar 24, 2025 and is issued by Polen.

data.title: Polen Capital Expands Active ETF Lineup with Two Credit ETFs
data.text: BOCA RATON, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Polen Capital, a global investment management firm specializing in growth equity and credit, is pleased to announce that it is launching two new active credit ETFs: ...
